cacheItem.title: I continue to maintain genomics is a bit like AI in the 2010’s — a small number of people have been going at it for many

payload.text: I continue to maintain genomics is a bit like AI in the 2010’s — a small number of people have been going at it for many years, and it’s only now becoming obvious to the broader world + Silicon Valley the profound impact it will have.
payload.full_text: I continue to maintain genomics is a bit like AI in the 2010’s — a small number of people have been going at it for many years, and it’s only now becoming obvious to the broader world + Silicon Valley the profound impact it will have.
